{"key_event":"Agrarian reform and mass mobilization","reasoning":"Civil society strengthened markedly as Communists were legalized, cleaner elections empowered voters, and labor, student, poblador, and peasant organizations expanded. The state also extended its developmental and reformist reach through planning, reconstruction, copper Chileanization, and agrarian reform, but inflation, fiscal strain, foreign dependence, and polarization limited the net gain.","society_change":0.5,"society_power":8.3,"state_change":0.1,"state_power":8.9}
